---
title: "Instructor Only: Ranked Comparisons Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
states <- read_csv("data/real/state_population_ranks.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

top_states <- states |>
  slice_max(population, n = 12) |>
  mutate(state_name = reorder(state_name, population))

ggplot(top_states, aes(x = population, y = state_name)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Largest States In The Population Rank Dataset",
    x = "Population",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
